text:
I see your ACH withdrawal for $3,400 placed Monday is still showing "pending review" as of Thursday. I don't have visibility into why it's holding at that status, so I'm passing this to our payments team to look into.

To help them locate it quickly, can you confirm the last 4 digits of the bank account and the approximate time you submitted the request? A human will follow up once they have more information.

Novig Support
